name: Tramadol
indications:
## Main indications

Analgesic.

> Adjust according to institutional protocol and medical prescription.

pediatrico.presentation: Calmador(R) capsules: 50 mg, drops: 1 mL=20 drops=50 mg, 1 mL ampoules: 50 mg/mL; Lixidol: tablets 50 mg, drops: 1 mL=24 drops=100 mg; Nobligán(R) capsules: 50 mg, drops: 1 mL=40 drops=100 mg, 2 mL ampoules: 50 mg/mL
pediatrico.dose: 1-2 mg/kg/dose every 8 h, maximum dose: 3 - 6 mg/kg/day. Adults: 50-100 mg every 4-6 h, maximum dose: 400 mg/day. When switching to controlled-release capsules give every 12 h. Adjust dose in hepatic insufficiency.
pediatrico.notes: Drug under evaluation in pediatrics; use in older children and adolescents. Interacts with carbamazepine and tricyclic antidepressants. See alert

stability:
## Pediatric guide

- Discard remainder once opened.
adverseEffects:
## Adverse effects

See opioid analgesics section.
